title: Token 为中心的连续批处理：schedule() 不分 prefill/decode 相
code_spine: vllm/v1/core/sched/interface.py:L36-L101  —— SchedulerInterface.schedule()/update_from_output() 契约：每拍 = 一次 forward；schedule() 产出 {req_id: num_tokens}
vllm/v1/core/sched/scheduler.py:L352-L362  —— schedule() 开场注释：没有 decoding/prefill phase，只有 num_computed_tokens 追赶 num_tokens_with_spec
vllm/v1/core/sched/scheduler.py:L364-L385  —— 每拍初始化：四个结果列表 + token_budget = max_num_scheduled_tokens + PAUSED_ALL 短路
vllm/v1/core/sched/scheduler.py:L387-L555  —— 第一阶段：先调度 RUNNING（req_index 遍历 self.running，预算分配，allocate_slots 失败则尾部抢占）
vllm/v1/core/sched/scheduler.py:L567-L846  —— 第二阶段：再调度 WAITING（前缀缓存命中、chunked prefill、入 running、WAITING→RUNNING）
vllm/v1/core/sched/scheduler.py:L848-L859  —— 约束断言：total_num_scheduled_tokens ≤ 预算，running ≤ max_num_running_reqs
vllm/v1/core/sched/scheduler.py:L871-L926  —— 组装 SchedulerOutput：scheduled_new_reqs(NewRequestData 首次全量) vs scheduled_cached_reqs(CachedRequestData 增量)
vllm/v1/core/sched/scheduler.py:L974-L998  —— _update_after_schedule()：调度后立即推进 num_computed_tokens，标记 is_prefill_chunk
vllm/v1/core/sched/scheduler.py:L1043-L1101  —— _make_cached_request_data()：用 prev_step_scheduled_req_ids 判定增量 vs 全量 token
vllm/v1/core/sched/scheduler.py:L1290-L1551  —— update_from_output()：吃 ModelRunnerOutput，追加 token、判 stop、free、产出 EngineCoreOutputs
vllm/v1/core/sched/async_scheduler.py:L12-L60  —— AsyncScheduler 覆写 _update_after_schedule/_update_request_with_output：num_output_placeholders 占位实现“调度时还不知上一拍 token”

embed_excerpts.code:
@abstractmethod
    def schedule(self) -> "SchedulerOutput":
        """Schedule the requests to process in this scheduling step.

        The scheduling decision is made at the iteration level. Each scheduling
        step corresponds to a single forward pass of the model. Therefore, this
        method is called repeatedly by a busy loop in the engine.

        Essentially, the scheduler produces a dictionary of {req_id: num_tokens}
        that specifies how many tokens to process for each request in this
        scheduling step. For example, num_tokens can be as large as the number
        of prompt tokens for new requests, or it can be 1 for the requests that
        are auto-regressively generating new tokens one by one. Otherwise, it
        can be somewhere in between in case of chunked prefills, prefix caching,
        speculative decoding, etc."""
elide: docstring 后半段（返回值描述）已省，不影响理解 {req_id: num_tokens} 这一核心契约

embed_excerpts.code:
def schedule(self) -> SchedulerOutput:
        # NOTE(woosuk) on the scheduling algorithm:
        # There's no "decoding phase" nor "prefill phase" in the scheduler.
        # Each request just has the num_computed_tokens and
        # num_tokens_with_spec. num_tokens_with_spec =
        # len(prompt_token_ids) + len(output_token_ids) + len(spec_token_ids).
        # At each step, the scheduler tries to assign tokens to the requests
        # so that each request's num_computed_tokens can catch up its
        # num_tokens_with_spec. This is general enough to cover
        # chunked prefills, prefix caching, speculative decoding,
        # and the "jump decoding" optimization in the future.

        scheduled_new_reqs: list[Request] = []
        scheduled_resumed_reqs: list[Request] = []
        scheduled_running_reqs: list[Request] = []
        preempted_reqs: list[Request] = []

        req_to_new_blocks: dict[str, KVCacheBlocks] = {}
        num_scheduled_tokens: dict[str, int] = {}
        token_budget = self.max_num_scheduled_tokens
        if self._pause_state == PauseState.PAUSED_ALL:
            # Do not schedule any requests when paused.
            token_budget = 0

        # Encoder-related.
        scheduled_encoder_inputs: dict[str, list[int]] = {}
        encoder_compute_budget = self.max_num_encoder_input_tokens
        # Spec decode-related.
        scheduled_spec_decode_tokens: dict[str, list[int]] = {}

        # For logging.
        scheduled_timestamp = time.monotonic()

        self.kv_cache_manager.new_step_starts()

# First, schedule the RUNNING requests.
        req_index = 0
        while req_index < len(self.running) and token_budget > 0:
            request = self.running[req_index]

            num_new_tokens = (
                request.num_tokens_with_spec
                + request.num_output_placeholders
                - request.num_computed_tokens
            )
            if 0 < self.scheduler_config.long_prefill_token_threshold < num_new_tokens:
                num_new_tokens = self.scheduler_config.long_prefill_token_threshold
            num_new_tokens = min(num_new_tokens, token_budget)

            # Make sure the input position does not exceed the max model len.
            # This is necessary when using spec decoding.
            num_new_tokens = min(
                num_new_tokens, self.max_model_len - 1 - request.num_computed_tokens
            )
elide: L392-L406 async-scheduling 提前剪枝分支（num_output_placeholders>0 且已达 max_tokens 则跳过）已省——属 async 优化，writer 在 AsyncScheduler 小节单独讲；这里突出 num_new_tokens = num_tokens_with_spec - num_computed_tokens 这一‘追赶’公式

embed_excerpts.code:
if num_new_tokens == 0:
                # The request cannot be scheduled because one of the following
                # reasons: ... (encoder budget / cache exhausted, etc.)
                # NOTE(woosuk): Here, by doing `continue` instead of `break`,
                # we do not strictly follow the FCFS scheduling policy and
                # allow the lower-priority requests to be scheduled.
                req_index += 1
                continue

            # Schedule newly needed KV blocks for the request.
            with record_function_or_nullcontext("schedule: allocate_slots"):
                while True:
                    new_blocks = self.kv_cache_manager.allocate_slots(
                        request,
                        num_new_tokens,
                        num_lookahead_tokens=self.num_lookahead_tokens,
                    )

                    if new_blocks is not None:
                        # The request can be scheduled.
                        break

                    # The request cannot be scheduled.
                    # Preempt the lowest-priority request.
                    if self.policy == SchedulingPolicy.PRIORITY:
                        preempted_req = max(
                            self.running,
                            key=lambda r: (r.priority, r.arrival_time),
                        )
                        self.running.remove(preempted_req)
                        ...
                    else:
                        preempted_req = self.running.pop()

                    self._preempt_request(preempted_req, scheduled_timestamp)
                    preempted_reqs.append(preempted_req)
                    if preempted_req == request:
                        # No more request to preempt. Cannot schedule this request.
                        break

            if new_blocks is None:
                # Cannot schedule this request.
                break

            # Schedule the request.
            scheduled_running_reqs.append(request)
            request_id = request.request_id
            req_to_new_blocks[request_id] = new_blocks
            num_scheduled_tokens[request_id] = num_new_tokens
            token_budget -= num_new_tokens
            req_index += 1
elide: L479-L502 PRIORITY 抢占的细节（恢复 token_budget/encoder budget/req_index 回退）压缩为 `...`——writer 可只讲 FCFS 默认分支 self.running.pop() 抢队尾；num_new_tokens==0 的具体四种原因压缩为括注

embed_excerpts.code:
# Next, schedule the WAITING requests.
        if not preempted_reqs and self._pause_state == PauseState.UNPAUSED:
            step_skipped_waiting = create_request_queue(self.policy)

            while (self.waiting or self.skipped_waiting) and token_budget > 0:
                if len(self.running) == self.max_num_running_reqs:
                    break

                request_queue = self._select_waiting_queue_for_scheduling()
                assert request_queue is not None

                request = request_queue.peek_request()
                request_id = request.request_id

                # try to promote blocked statuses while traversing skipped queue.
                if self._is_blocked_waiting_status(
                    request.status
                ) and not self._try_promote_blocked_waiting_request(request):
                    ...
                    request_queue.pop_request()
                    step_skipped_waiting.prepend_request(request)
                    continue
elide: 关键：`if not preempted_reqs` —— 本拍只要发生过抢占就完全不调度 WAITING（避免刚抢的内存又被新请求占走）。被阻塞状态(WAITING_FOR_REMOTE_KVS 等)的提升细节省略

embed_excerpts.code:
else:
                    # Number of tokens to be scheduled.
                    # We use `request.num_tokens` instead of
                    # `request.num_prompt_tokens` to consider the resumed
                    # requests, which have output tokens.
                    num_new_tokens = request.num_tokens - num_computed_tokens
                    threshold = self.scheduler_config.long_prefill_token_threshold
                    if 0 < threshold < num_new_tokens:
                        num_new_tokens = threshold

                    # chunked prefill has to be enabled explicitly to allow
                    # pooling requests to be chunked
                    if (
                        not self.scheduler_config.enable_chunked_prefill
                        and num_new_tokens > token_budget
                    ):
                        # If chunked_prefill is disabled,
                        # we can stop the scheduling here.
                        break

                    num_new_tokens = min(num_new_tokens, token_budget)
                    assert num_new_tokens > 0
elide: load_kv_async 分支（KVConnector 远程取 KV，num_new_tokens=0）省略；L614-L662 取前缀缓存命中 tokens / KVConnector 外部命中 的细节属 KV cache 章，这里只需 num_computed_tokens 已含命中数
首次调度(WAITING)→scheduled_new_reqs；抢占后恢复(PREEMPTED)→scheduled_resumed_reqs；两者都 append 进 self.running 并置 RUNNING

embed_excerpts.code:
# Check if the scheduling constraints are satisfied.
        total_num_scheduled_tokens = sum(num_scheduled_tokens.values())
        assert total_num_scheduled_tokens <= self.max_num_scheduled_tokens

        assert token_budget >= 0
        assert len(self.running) <= self.max_num_running_reqs
        # Since some requests in the RUNNING queue may not be scheduled in
        # this step, the total number of scheduled requests can be smaller than
        # len(self.running).
        assert len(scheduled_new_reqs) + len(scheduled_resumed_reqs) + len(
            scheduled_running_reqs
        ) <= len(self.running)

# Construct the scheduler output.
        if self.use_v2_model_runner:
            ...
        else:
            new_reqs_data = [
                NewRequestData.from_request(
                    req, req_to_new_blocks[req.request_id].get_block_ids()
                )
                for req in scheduled_new_reqs
            ]

        with record_function_or_nullcontext("schedule: make_cached_request_data"):
            cached_reqs_data = self._make_cached_request_data(
                scheduled_running_reqs,
                scheduled_resumed_reqs,
                num_scheduled_tokens,
                scheduled_spec_decode_tokens,
                req_to_new_blocks,
            )

        # Record the request ids that were scheduled in this step.
        self.prev_step_scheduled_req_ids.clear()
        self.prev_step_scheduled_req_ids.update(num_scheduled_tokens.keys())

        scheduler_output = SchedulerOutput(
            scheduled_new_reqs=new_reqs_data,
            scheduled_cached_reqs=cached_reqs_data,
            num_scheduled_tokens=num_scheduled_tokens,
            total_num_scheduled_tokens=total_num_scheduled_tokens,
            scheduled_spec_decode_tokens=scheduled_spec_decode_tokens,
            scheduled_encoder_inputs=scheduled_encoder_inputs,
            num_common_prefix_blocks=num_common_prefix_blocks,
            preempted_req_ids={req.request_id for req in preempted_reqs},
            finished_req_ids=self.finished_req_ids,
            free_encoder_mm_hashes=self.encoder_cache_manager.get_freed_mm_hashes(),
            new_block_ids_to_zero=new_block_ids_to_zero,
        )
elide: use_v2_model_runner 分支（把 resumed 合并进 new、附 _all_token_ids）压缩为 `...`；KVConnector/ECConnector metadata 注入(L928-L941)与 num_common_prefix_blocks 计算(L861-L869)省略——核心是 new(全量) vs cached(增量) 二分 + prev_step_scheduled_req_ids 在收尾刷新

embed_excerpts.code:
def _update_after_schedule(self, scheduler_output: SchedulerOutput) -> None:
        # Advance the number of computed tokens for the request AFTER
        # the request is scheduled.
        # 1. The scheduler_output of the current step has to include the
        #    original number of scheduled tokens to determine input IDs.
        # 2. Advance the number of computed tokens here allowing us to
        #    schedule the prefill request again immediately in the next
        #    scheduling step.
        # 3. If some tokens (e.g. spec tokens) are rejected later, the number of
        #    computed tokens will be adjusted in update_from_output.
        num_scheduled_tokens = scheduler_output.num_scheduled_tokens
        for req_id, num_scheduled_token in num_scheduled_tokens.items():
            request = self.requests[req_id]
            request.num_computed_tokens += num_scheduled_token
            request.is_prefill_chunk = request.num_computed_tokens < (
                request.num_tokens + request.num_output_placeholders
            )
            scheduler_output.has_structured_output_requests |= (
                request.use_structured_output and not request.is_prefill_chunk
            )

        # Clear the finished request IDs.
        # NOTE: We shouldn't do self.finished_req_ids.clear() here because
        # it will also affect the scheduler output.
        self.finished_req_ids = set()
elide: 这是同步基类版本：调度后立刻把 num_scheduled_token 计入 num_computed_tokens（乐观推进），无需等模型跑完——这正是连续批处理‘下一拍能立刻续上 chunked prefill’的关键

embed_excerpts.code:
num_running_reqs = len(running_reqs)
        for idx, req in enumerate(itertools.chain(running_reqs, resumed_reqs)):
            req_id = req.request_id
            req_ids.append(req_id)
            ...
            scheduled_in_prev_step = req_id in self.prev_step_scheduled_req_ids
            if idx >= num_running_reqs:
                assert not scheduled_in_prev_step
                resumed_req_ids.add(req_id)
            if not scheduled_in_prev_step:
                all_token_ids[req_id] = req.all_token_ids.copy()
            new_block_ids.append(
                req_to_new_blocks[req_id].get_block_ids(allow_none=True)
            )
            num_computed_tokens.append(req.num_computed_tokens)
            num_output_tokens.append(
                req.num_output_tokens + req.num_output_placeholders
            )

        return CachedRequestData(
            req_ids=req_ids,
            resumed_req_ids=resumed_req_ids,
            new_token_ids=new_token_ids,
            all_token_ids=all_token_ids,
            new_block_ids=new_block_ids,
            num_computed_tokens=num_computed_tokens,
            num_output_tokens=num_output_tokens,
        )
elide: L1063-L1078 PP（pipeline parallel）专用的 new_token_ids 回传分支压缩为 `...`：非 PP 时 new_token_ids 为空，worker 自己缓存采样 token。核心：scheduled_running_reqs(本就 RUNNING) + scheduled_resumed_reqs(抢占后恢复，idx≥num_running_reqs 标进 resumed_req_ids) 一并打包为增量；只对‘上一拍没调度过’的请求才传全量 all_token_ids

embed_excerpts.code:
@dataclass
class NewRequestData:
    req_id: str
    prompt_token_ids: list[int] | None
    mm_features: list[MultiModalFeatureSpec]
    sampling_params: SamplingParams | None
    pooling_params: PoolingParams | None
    block_ids: tuple[list[int], ...]
    num_computed_tokens: int
    lora_request: LoRARequest | None
    prompt_embeds: "torch.Tensor | None" = None
    prompt_is_token_ids: list[bool] | None = None
elide: __repr__/anon_repr 与 prefill_token_ids(仅 v2 runner) 省略。要点：首次调度的请求带‘全量’数据（prompt、采样参数、block_ids、mm）——worker 进程缓存它，后续步只发增量

embed_excerpts.code:
@dataclass
class CachedRequestData:
    req_ids: list[str]
    # For request ids not in resumed_req_ids, new_block_ids will be appended to
    # the request's block IDs. For those in the set, new_block_ids will be used as the
    # request's block IDs instead of appending to the existing block IDs.
    resumed_req_ids: set[str]
    # NOTE(woosuk): new_token_ids is only used for pipeline parallelism.
    # When PP is not used, new_token_ids will be empty.
    new_token_ids: list[list[int]]
    # For requests not scheduled in the last step, propagate the token ids to the
    # connector. Won't contain requests that were scheduled in the prior step.
    all_token_ids: dict[str, list[int]]
    new_block_ids: list[tuple[list[int], ...] | None]
    num_computed_tokens: list[int]
    num_output_tokens: list[int]
elide: anon_repr/make_empty/is_context_phase/_req_id_to_num_output_tokens 省略。要点：已缓存请求只发‘diff’——增量新增的 block_ids 与更新后的 num_computed_tokens，resumed_req_ids 区分‘追加 vs 替换’ block 语义

embed_excerpts.code:
@dataclass
class SchedulerOutput:
    # list of the requests that are scheduled for the first time.
    # We cache the request's data in each worker process, so that we don't
    # need to re-send it every scheduling step.
    scheduled_new_reqs: list[NewRequestData]
    # list of the requests that have been scheduled before.
    # Since the request's data is already cached in the worker processes,
    # we only send the diff to minimize the communication cost.
    scheduled_cached_reqs: CachedRequestData

    # req_id -> num_scheduled_tokens
    # Number of tokens scheduled for each request.
    num_scheduled_tokens: dict[str, int]
    # Total number of tokens scheduled for all requests.
    # Equal to sum(num_scheduled_tokens.values())
    total_num_scheduled_tokens: int
    # req_id -> spec_token_ids
    scheduled_spec_decode_tokens: dict[str, list[int]]
    # req_id -> encoder input indices that need processing.
    scheduled_encoder_inputs: dict[str, list[int]]
    # Number of common prefix blocks for all requests in each KV cache group.
    num_common_prefix_blocks: list[int]

    # Request IDs that are finished in between the previous and the current
    # steps. This is used to notify the workers ...
    finished_req_ids: set[str]
    free_encoder_mm_hashes: list[str]
elide: 其后众多带默认值字段（preempted_req_ids/has_structured_output_requests/pending_structured_output_tokens/num_invalid_spec_tokens/kv_connector_metadata/ec_connector_metadata/new_block_ids_to_zero）大多与 spec/structured/KV-connector/v2 runner 相关，writer 只需点名 finished_req_ids 与两段式 new/cached 二分即可

embed_excerpts.code:
class AsyncScheduler(Scheduler):
    def __init__(self, *args, **kwargs) -> None:
        super().__init__(*args, **kwargs)
        # reusable read-only placeholder list for speculative decoding.
        self._spec_token_placeholders: list[int] = [-1] * self.num_spec_tokens

    def _update_after_schedule(self, scheduler_output: SchedulerOutput) -> None:
        super()._update_after_schedule(scheduler_output)
        spec_decode_tokens = scheduler_output.scheduled_spec_decode_tokens
        for req_id in scheduler_output.num_scheduled_tokens:
            request = self.requests[req_id]
            if request.is_prefill_chunk:
                continue

            scheduler_output.pending_structured_output_tokens |= (
                request.use_structured_output and request.num_output_placeholders > 0
            )
            # The request will generate a new token plus num_spec_tokens
            # in this scheduling step.
            cur_num_spec_tokens = len(spec_decode_tokens.get(req_id, ()))
            request.num_output_placeholders += 1 + cur_num_spec_tokens
            # Add placeholders for the new draft/spec tokens.
            # We will update the actual spec token ids in the worker process.
            request.spec_token_ids = self._spec_token_placeholders
elide: 这是 async 与 sync 的核心差异：调度时上一拍的 token 尚未由模型算出，AsyncScheduler 给每个待出 token 的请求记 num_output_placeholders（+1 真 token +num_spec_tokens 草稿占位），让本拍能预先调度下一拍的 1 个 decode 槽位——这就是 f6 里 async_scheduling=True 推导出的实例如何驱动连续批处理

embed_excerpts.code:
def _update_request_with_output(
        self, request: Request, new_token_ids: list[int]
    ) -> tuple[list[int], bool]:
        if request.discard_latest_async_tokens:
            # If the request is force preempted in reset_prefix_cache, we
            # should discard the latest async token.
            request.discard_latest_async_tokens = False
            return [], False

        status_before_update = request.status
        new_token_ids, stopped = super()._update_request_with_output(
            request, new_token_ids
        )

        # Update the number of output placeholders.
        request.num_output_placeholders -= len(new_token_ids)
        assert request.num_output_placeholders >= 0

        # Cache the new tokens. Preempted requests should be skipped.
        if status_before_update == RequestStatus.RUNNING:
            self.kv_cache_manager.cache_blocks(
                request, request.num_computed_tokens - request.num_output_placeholders
            )
        return new_token_ids, stopped
elide: 当真 token 回来时，把对应的 num_output_placeholders 减回去（占位兑现）；并在此处才 cache_blocks（同步版在 allocate 时即缓存）——因为 async 下真 token 滞后一拍

key_classes.name: SchedulerInterface
key_classes.responsibility: 调度器抽象基类，定义 schedule()/update_from_output()/add_request()/finish_requests() 等契约；明确‘每个调度步=一次 forward’、schedule() 产出 {req_id: num_tokens}。同时定义 PauseState(UNPAUSED/PAUSED_NEW/PAUSED_ALL)。

key_classes.name: Scheduler
key_classes.responsibility: 同步连续批处理调度器（SchedulerInterface 实现）。持有 self.requests/waiting/skipped_waiting/running 队列与 KVCacheManager/EncoderCacheManager；schedule() 两阶段（先 RUNNING 后 WAITING）按 token 预算分配；update_from_output() 吃模型输出、追加 token、判 stop、free、产出 EngineCoreOutputs。

key_classes.name: AsyncScheduler
key_classes.responsibility: 异步调度器，继承 Scheduler，只覆写 _update_after_schedule()/_update_request_with_output()。用 num_output_placeholders 占位机制解决‘调度本拍时上一拍 token 还没算完’——允许调度与执行重叠（async_scheduling=True 时 EngineCore 实例化它）。

key_classes.name: NewRequestData
key_classes.responsibility: 首次被调度的请求的‘全量’数据（prompt/采样参数/block_ids/mm/num_computed_tokens）。worker 进程收到后缓存，避免后续每步重发。from_request() 工厂构造。

key_classes.name: CachedRequestData
key_classes.responsibility: 已调度过请求的‘增量 diff’：req_ids + resumed_req_ids(替换 vs 追加 block 语义) + new_block_ids + num_computed_tokens + num_output_tokens（PP 时还带 new_token_ids）。最小化调度器→worker 的通信量。

key_classes.name: SchedulerOutput
key_classes.responsibility: 一拍调度的完整产物：scheduled_new_reqs(NewRequestData 列表) + scheduled_cached_reqs(CachedRequestData) + num_scheduled_tokens(每请求 token 数) + total_num_scheduled_tokens + finished_req_ids + 各类 spec/encoder/connector 元数据。送往 model runner。

data_flow: 1. EngineCore busy loop 调用 scheduler.schedule() —— interface.py:schedule 契约：每拍对应一次 forward
2. scheduler.py:schedule 初始化 token_budget = max_num_scheduled_tokens（PAUSED_ALL 则置 0）
3. 第一阶段 RUNNING：遍历 self.running，对每个请求算 num_new_tokens = num_tokens_with_spec + num_output_placeholders - num_computed_tokens，截到 long_prefill_token_threshold / token_budget / max_model_len-1

4. kv_cache_manager.allocate_slots 分配 KV 块；失败则 FCFS 抢占队尾(self.running.pop())或 PRIORITY 抢最低优先级，被抢者 _preempt_request 回 waiting；成功则记 num_scheduled_tokens[id]=num_new_tokens、token_budget -= num_new_tokens

5. 第二阶段 WAITING（仅当本拍未发生抢占 且 UNPAUSED）：_select_waiting_queue_for_scheduling 选队（skipped_waiting/waiting），peek 请求，查前缀缓存命中 num_computed_tokens，算 num_new_tokens = num_tokens - num_computed_tokens（chunked prefill 截预算）
7. 收尾断言 total_num_scheduled_tokens ≤ max_num_scheduled_tokens、running ≤ max_num_running_reqs
8. 组装 SchedulerOutput：scheduled_new_reqs 走 NewRequestData.from_request（全量），scheduled_running/resumed 走 _make_cached_request_data（增量）；用 prev_step_scheduled_req_ids 判定哪些请求需补传 all_token_ids
10. _update_after_schedule：把 num_scheduled_token 乐观计入 num_computed_tokens，标 is_prefill_chunk；AsyncScheduler 额外 num_output_placeholders += 1 + num_spec_tokens 占位
11. 返回 SchedulerOutput → model runner forward

12. 模型跑完 → scheduler.update_from_output(scheduler_output, model_runner_output)：遍历 num_scheduled_tokens，取 sampled_token_ids，spec 拒绝则回退 num_computed_tokens，_update_request_with_output 追加 token + check_stop，stopped 则 _free_request，产出 EngineCoreOutputs；从 running/waiting 移除停止的请求

design_decisions.decision: 调度器不区分 prefill/decode 相——统一为 num_computed_tokens 追赶 num_tokens_with_spec
design_decisions.why: Token 为中心的连续批处理：每请求只有‘已算 token 数’与‘待算 token 数(含 spec)’两个标量，每拍尽量让前者追上后者。同一套逻辑天然覆盖 chunked prefill、prefix caching、spec decode——无需为 prefill 和 decode 写两条代码路径（这是 v1 相对 v0 的核心简化）

design_decisions.decision: RUNNING 优先于 WAITING，且本拍一旦抢占就不再调度 WAITING
design_decisions.why: 先保证在途请求推进（低延迟、避免饿死与反复抢占抖动）；`if not preempted_reqs` 守卫：刚抢占释放的内存不应立刻被新请求占走，否则被抢者更难恢复

design_decisions.decision: 用全局 token_budget(=max_num_scheduled_tokens) 跨两阶段统一分配，而非各请求固定配额
design_decisions.why: 连续批处理的批大小是‘token 数’而非‘请求数’——一拍内 prefill 的大 chunk 与 decode 的单 token 共享同一预算池，灵活打满 GPU。max_num_scheduled_tokens 缺省回退到 max_num_batched_tokens

design_decisions.decision: SchedulerOutput 二分 NewRequestData(全量) vs CachedRequestData(增量)
design_decisions.why: worker 进程首次收到请求即缓存其静态数据(prompt/采样参数/mm)，后续步只发 diff(新增 block_ids、num_computed_tokens)，最小化调度器→worker 的 IPC 通信量。prev_step_scheduled_req_ids 用来判定哪些请求‘上一拍没调度’需补传 all_token_ids

design_decisions.decision: _update_after_schedule 在调度后立即乐观推进 num_computed_tokens（不等模型跑完）
design_decisions.why: 让 chunked prefill 的下一个 chunk 能在下一拍立即被调度，无需等 forward 返回；若 spec token 后续被拒，在 update_from_output 里回退 num_computed_tokens

design_decisions.decision: AsyncScheduler 用 num_output_placeholders 占位实现调度/执行重叠
design_decisions.why: async_scheduling 下调度第 N 拍时第 N-1 拍的采样 token 还没算完，无法读到 num_computed_tokens 的真实增量。给每个待出 token 的请求记 1+num_spec_tokens 个占位，使调度能预先为下一拍 decode 留槽；真 token 回来时在 _update_request_with_output 里把占位减回并 cache_blocks。回收 f6：这正是 async_scheduling=True 推导出的 AsyncScheduler 实例如何驱动连续批处理

design_decisions.decision: FCFS 抢占队尾、PRIORITY 抢最低优先级；num_new_tokens==0 用 continue 而非 break
design_decisions.why: 抢占总挑‘最该让位’的请求（FCFS 最晚到=队尾，PRIORITY 优先级最低）。num_new_tokens==0（编码预算/缓存耗尽等）时 continue 跳过该请求继续看后面的——不严格遵守 FCFS，让低优先请求也有机会被调度，避免一个卡住的请求阻塞整批

theory: num_new_tokens 计算（RUNNING）：num_new_tokens = num_tokens_with_spec + num_output_placeholders - num_computed_tokens，再 min(long_prefill_token_threshold, token_budget, max_model_len-1-num_computed_tokens)。num_tokens_with_spec = len(prompt)+len(output)+len(spec)（request.py:L238）。decode 时该差≈1（或 1+spec），prefill 时该差≈剩余 prompt 长度。
num_new_tokens 计算（WAITING）：num_new_tokens = request.num_tokens - num_computed_tokens（num_computed_tokens 含前缀缓存命中），chunked prefill 关闭且 > token_budget 则 break（整块或不调度）。
token 预算守恒：total_num_scheduled_tokens = sum(num_scheduled_tokens.values()) ≤ max_num_scheduled_tokens，且 token_budget ≥ 0 始终成立——连续批处理一拍的‘token 批大小’上界。
连续批处理吞吐直觉：一拍可同时含 K1 个 decode 请求(各 1 token)+K2 个 prefill chunk(各数百 token)，只要 ΣnumNewTokens ≤ 预算且 Σrunning ≤ max_num_running_reqs。批组成每拍动态变化（请求随时进出 running），故称‘连续(continuous)’而非静态批。

async 占位守恒：AsyncScheduler 每出 1 真 token 时 num_output_placeholders -= len(new_token_ids)，调度时 += 1+num_spec_tokens，spec 拒绝时在 update_from_output 里 -= num_rejected——占位计数与真实/草稿 token 的产出/拒绝严格配平，assert num_output_placeholders >= 0。

delete.what: KVConnector / ECConnector 相关全部分支（self.connector、self.ec_connector、load_kv_async、get_num_new_matched_tokens、_build_kv_connector_meta、_handle_invalid_blocks、_update_from_kv_xfer_finished、WAITING_FOR_REMOTE_KVS 状态处理）
delete.why_safe: P/D 分离与远程 KV 传输是独立子系统，本章讲连续批处理核心；删除后单机调度逻辑完整自洽，所有相关字段默认 None/空集
纯文本请求 has_encoder_inputs=False，整段不进；多模态属另章，删后文本路径不变
约束解码是独立特性，普通采样请求不触发；删后采样路径完整
仅 Mamba/SSM 模型用；标准 Transformer 不进该分支
无 LoRA 时 lora_config=None，整段跳过
流式输入会话是少见特性，普通一问一答请求 resumable=False，不进

delete.what: PRIORITY 调度策略分支（保留 FCFS）：_select_waiting_queue_for_scheduling 的 PRIORITY 比较、抢占时 max(...) 选最低优先级、req_index 回退逻辑
delete.why_safe: 默认 policy=FCFS；只保留 self.running.pop() 抢队尾即可讲清抢占机制，PRIORITY 是同构变体

delete.what: pipeline parallel 分支（use_pp、_make_cached_request_data 里 new_token_ids 回传、use_v2_model_runner 合并 resumed 进 new）
delete.why_safe: 单卡/无 PP 时 use_pp=False、new_token_ids 恒空；v2 runner 是实验路径

delete.what: spec decode 的统计与 num_invalid_spec_tokens（make_spec_decoding_stats、update_draft_token_ids_in_output 的 grammar 校验、SpecDecodingStats）
delete.why_safe: 保留 num_output_placeholders 占位主干即可讲清 async；spec 的拒绝统计与 grammar 校验是细节，不影响连续批处理骨架。注意：spec token 的占位加减（+num_spec_tokens / -num_rejected）须保留以解释 async 配平
日志与统计不改变调度决策，删后控制流不变

delete.what: DCP/PCP 上下文并行、routed_experts、kv_event_publisher 等初始化分支
delete.why_safe: 均为可选特性，缺省关闭，与连续批处理主干无耦合

must_keep.why: 本章主角方法，连续批处理一拍的入口
token 预算池，连续批处理‘批大小=token 数’的载体，须展示其跨两阶段递减
预算上界来源，读者需理解配额从哪来
schedule() 的核心产物 {req_id: num_tokens}，契约本身
预算守恒断言的对象
‘待算 token 数’，num_new_tokens 追赶公式的被减数
‘已算 token 数’，追赶公式的减数；_update_after_schedule 乐观推进它
本拍给该请求分配的 token 数，预算分配的核心变量
RUNNING 队列，第一阶段遍历对象
WAITING 队列，第二阶段调度来源
本拍调度的在途请求，进 CachedRequestData
首次调度请求，进 NewRequestData（全量）
抢占后恢复请求，进 resumed_req_ids（替换 block 语义）
本拍被抢占请求；`if not preempted_reqs` 守卫 WAITING 阶段
抢占动作：释放 KV、回 waiting、num_computed_tokens=0
KV 块分配，返回 None 即触发抢占——调度与显存的耦合点
构造增量 CachedRequestData，含 prev_step 判定全量/增量
判定请求是否‘上一拍调度过’，决定是否补传 all_token_ids
调度后乐观推进 num_computed_tokens、标 is_prefill_chunk——连续批处理‘下一拍立即续上’的关键；async 在此覆写
标记请求是否还在 prefill 阶段（影响 async 占位与 spec）
调度反馈环的另一半：吃模型输出、追加 token、判 stop、free
追加 output token + check_stop；async 覆写它做占位兑现
一拍产物数据结构
首次调度全量数据结构
已调度增量数据结构
AsyncScheduler 占位计数，解释调度/执行重叠的核心字段
异步调度器类，f6 回收对象
跨拍传给 worker 清理已结束请求的状态
running 上界，并发请求数约束
暂停状态枚举，影响是否调度（PAUSED_ALL→budget=0）

diagram_plan.name: 13-token-centric-budget
diagram_plan.purpose: 展示一拍 schedule() 的 token 预算分配：横轴 token_budget 条，先被 RUNNING 的若干 decode(各1 token)消耗，再被 WAITING 的 prefill chunk(数百 token)消耗，直到预算耗尽。突出‘批大小=token 数、prefill 与 decode 混在同一拍’。
diagram_plan.svg_spec: 水平预算条 + 分段填色（绿=RUNNING decode 单 token、蓝=WAITING prefill chunk），右端标 max_num_scheduled_tokens 红线；下方标注 token_budget 逐段递减数值

diagram_plan.name: 13-schedule-two-phase
diagram_plan.purpose: schedule() 两阶段流程图：阶段1遍历 running（算 num_new_tokens→allocate_slots→失败则抢占队尾），阶段2（仅当无抢占）遍历 waiting（前缀缓存→chunked→入 running）→组装 SchedulerOutput。
diagram_plan.svg_spec: 纵向泳道流程图，两个阶段框 + `if not preempted_reqs` 守卫菱形 + allocate_slots 失败→_preempt_request 回环箭头

diagram_plan.name: 13-new-vs-cached
diagram_plan.purpose: SchedulerOutput 的 NewRequestData(全量) vs CachedRequestData(增量) 对比：首次调度发全量 prompt/参数/block，后续步只发 diff（新 block_ids+num_computed_tokens）。配 prev_step_scheduled_req_ids 判定。
diagram_plan.svg_spec: 左右两栏对照表，左 NewRequestData 字段全列（粗），右 CachedRequestData 字段（仅 diff，细），中间箭头标‘worker 缓存后只收 diff’

diagram_plan.name: 13-async-placeholder
diagram_plan.purpose: AsyncScheduler 占位机制时间线：拍 N 调度时拍 N-1 token 未算完，用 num_output_placeholders 占位预调度拍 N+1 的 decode 槽；真 token 回来时占位兑现。对比 Scheduler(同步，必须等)。
diagram_plan.svg_spec: 两条时间线泳道（同步 vs 异步），异步线展示 schedule(N) 与 forward(N-1) 重叠、num_output_placeholders +1/-1 计数变化

should_recover.what: async_scheduling 推导出的 AsyncScheduler/Scheduler 实例如何驱动连续批处理
should_recover.recover_note: 本章 AsyncScheduler 小节回收：async_scheduling=True 时 EngineCore 实例化 AsyncScheduler，其 num_output_placeholders 占位机制让 schedule(N) 与 forward(N-1) 重叠，从而驱动连续批处理无气泡推进。embed_excerpts async_scheduler.py:L18-L35 与 design_decisions 第6条。

should_recover.what: scheduler.schedule() 如何决定每拍推哪些请求、推多少 token（连续批处理）
should_recover.recover_note: 本章主线全程回收：两阶段(RUNNING 优先/WAITING 其次) + num_new_tokens 追赶公式 + token_budget 预算分配 + 不分 prefill/decode 相。ch11 当黑盒，ch13 钻进 schedule() 全展开。
